      "title": "SiteSetting.default_locale captured at boot time",
      "description": "The FallbackLocaleList class captures SiteSetting.default_locale once when the I18n.fallbacks object is instantiated. If the site's default locale is changed at runtime (via admin settings), the fallback chain will continue using the stale boot-time value. This means users may not get translations in the newly-configured default language.",
      "suggestion": "Call SiteSetting.default_locale inside the [] method rather than at initialization: Change line 17 from `[locale, SiteSetting.default_locale.to_sym, :en].uniq.compact` to evaluate SiteSetting.default_locale at lookup time to pick up runtime changes."
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "category": "Initialization Order Dependency",
      "file": "config/initializers/i18n.rb",
      "line": 1,
      "title": "Relies on SiteSetting availability at boot",
      "description": "The initializer references SiteSetting.default_locale (line 17) but does not verify that SiteSetting has been loaded. If this initializer runs before the database is seeded or SiteSetting is initialized, accessing SiteSetting.default_locale may fail or return unexpected values.",
      "suggestion": "Add a guard to defer SiteSetting access until it's available, or wrap the fallback chain lookup in a method that handles SiteSetting initialization gracefully."
    }
  ]
}
